creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193055
patch to remove CONFLICT from devel/liblas

After r467861 [1] is in the ports, there is no need any more for the conflict in devel/liblas. After the changes in devel/liblas12, it is possible to install math/saga with devel/liblas12 and in the same box to install databases/grass7 with devel/liblas.

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=467861
